subject: tieng-anh
topic: Ôn tập cuối học kỳ 2 — Tiếng Anh 7

questions.question: What does 'festival' mean? (Từ 'festival' nghĩa là gì?)
What is the English word for 'phim'? ('phim' tiếng Anh là gì?)
Which is an English-speaking country? (Nước nào nói tiếng Anh?)
Choose the correct word: 'How ___ water do you drink every day?' (nước - không đếm được)
Complete: 'A: Do you want some tea? B: Yes, ___ tea, please.' (điền 'some')
What is the past simple of 'go'? (Quá khứ đơn của 'go')
Choose the comparative: 'A plane is ___ than a car.' (nhanh hơn)
Complete: 'There aren't ___ apples in the fridge.' (điền từ đúng)

statements.text: A bicycle is faster than a plane.

questions.question: Write the past simple of 'watch' (Viết quá khứ đơn của 'watch'): ___
Choose the correct question about food (Chọn câu hỏi đúng về món ăn)
How might people travel in the future? (Trong tương lai con người có thể đi lại bằng gì?)

questions.passage: Last summer, Nam visited London, the capital of England. He saw Big Ben and took a ride on the London Eye. He tried fish and chips, a famous English food. Nam had a wonderful trip and took many photos.
questions.question: Which city did Nam visit? (Nam đã thăm thành phố nào?)

questions.passage: Last summer, Nam visited London, the capital of England. He saw Big Ben and took a ride on the London Eye. He tried fish and chips, a famous English food. Nam had a wonderful trip and took many photos.
questions.question: What famous food did Nam try? (Nam đã thử món ăn nổi tiếng nào?)

questions.passage: Last summer, Nam visited London, the capital of England. He saw Big Ben and took a ride on the London Eye. He tried fish and chips, a famous English food. Nam had a wonderful trip and took many photos.
questions.question: How was Nam's trip? (Chuyến đi của Nam thế nào?)
You want to invite a friend to a festival (Em muốn mời bạn đi dự một lễ hội)
options: Would you like to go to the festival with me?
